name: @ts-doctor/cli-effect
description: The user-facing `ts-doctor` CLI, re-imagined on `@effect/cli`: POSIX flag parsing, auto-help, and RULE-028 flag-exclusivity encoded as `Options` constraints. Wires the finished engine + format + fix-applier + build-report + exit-code slices into the default `inspect` command and the `install` subcommand. Equivalence is BEHAVIORAL (same flags accepted, same validation rejections, same output content, same exit codes), not a byte-verbatim port of the hand-rolled argv parser.
